narrative:
Warren South (precinct in Washington County) has 960 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
